context: Tests whether the StoreKit skill stays scoped to IAP implementation while routing App Review and ASO concerns to sibling skills and avoiding outdated external-link overclaims.

checklist.name: StoreKit scope
checklist.description: Keeps StoreKit guidance focused on IAP products, paywalls, purchase flows, transaction verification, restore purchases, and entitlement handling.

checklist.name: App Review routing
checklist.description: Routes privacy manifests, ATT, screenshots, metadata rejection risk, entitlement review, and full submission readiness to app-store-review.

checklist.name: ASO routing
checklist.description: Routes keyword strategy, ranking, screenshot-caption optimization, and conversion work to app-store-optimization.

checklist.name: IAP compliance nuance
checklist.description: States that digital features generally require IAP unless a current guideline exception, storefront rule, or approved entitlement applies.

checklist.name: External link nuance
checklist.description: Avoids a blanket claim that all external purchase links are always rejected and calls out reader-app and regional or storefront-sensitive rules.
